com.mentor.chs.api.report

Interface IXIntegratorReport

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXEmbeddableReport, IXPlugin, IXReportCreator

    public interface IXIntegratorReport
extends IXEmbeddableReport
    If you need to implement a Custom report generation that works on Integrator designs, you need to implement this interface.

    • Method Summary

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.api.report.IXEmbeddableReport

        getStyleSheet

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.api.report.IXReportCreator

        createReport

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXPlugin

        getDescription, getName, getVersion
